verdict: RealifiedAssets are mostly embedded-textured GLB probes. Assets with complete Unity sidecar PBR maps and sufficient mesh attributes can be promoted as sidecar PBR candidates, but the global visual gate still requires semantic category review and gameplay binding evidence.
